prompt.stem: $\dfrac{3}{4}$ of the light from a star is absorbed and reflected by a cloud of interstellar gas. The remaining light is refracted by the gas and travels on to the next layer of interstellar gas. Which of the following statements is/are correct?

options.label: A
options.text: The next layer of interstellar gas is denser than the cloud of interstellar gas.

options.label: B
options.text: The cloud of interstellar gas is hotter than the next layer of interstellar gas.

options.label: C
options.text: The next layer of interstellar gas is hotter than the cloud of interstellar gas.

options.label: D
options.text: The cloud of interstellar gas is colder than the next layer of interstellar gas.

options.label: E
options.text: The next layer of interstellar gas is colder than the cloud of interstellar gas.
